UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile state containing visual customization settings, subscription limits, saved marketing campaigns, custom prompts vault, and user activity logs.

activeTier.description: The selected active subscription level: Starter, Creator Pro, or Enterprise

creditsUsed.description: Cumulative tokens or credits consumed through prompt generations

creditLimit.description: Maximum token threshold allowed by the selected active tier

generatedPromptsCount.description: The overall count of generated items by the user

lastActivityTime.description: Timestamp string indicating when the user last interacted with the app dashboard

projects.description: Saved campaign output decks or marketing blueprints

prompts.description: User personal instruction templates or prompt designs stored in the Vault

activities.description: Chronological audit log of user dashboard activity feeds

analyticsData.description: Historical, predictive, and live performance metrics for tokens, API requests, sessions, workspace triggers, and simulated revenue billing
